ddls:
CREATE TABLE "car_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the car (e.g., 2WD, 4WD) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the car model */,
  "engine_size" TEXT /* Engine size in liters */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "safety_rating" INTEGER /* Safety rating of the car model */,
  "market_value" TEXT /* Market value of the car model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premiums" (
  "premium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premium record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "comp" TEXT /* Comprehensive premium */,
  "collision" TEXT /* Collision premium */,
  "liability" TEXT /* Liability premium */,
  "medical" TEXT /* Medical premium */,
  "um_uim" TEXT /* UM/UIM premium */,
  "annual_premium" TEXT /* Annual premium */,
  "monthly_premium" TEXT /* Monthly premium */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the premium becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the premium expires */,
  "discount_rate" TEXT /* Discount rate applied to the premium */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applied to the premium */,
  "total_premium" TEXT /* Total premium after applying discounts and taxes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("premium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premiums_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premium_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premium change */,
  "premium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the premium record being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the premium change */,
  "previous_annual_premium" TEXT /* Previous annual premium */,
  "previous_monthly_premium" TEXT /* Previous monthly premium */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the premium change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_history_premium_id FOREIGN KEY ("premium_id") REFERENCES premiums ("premium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "premium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the premium record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the premium information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the premium information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_premium_id FOREIGN KEY ("premium_id") REFERENCES premiums ("premium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
